node.title: Need Guidance for System Design Prep (LLD) – 1 YOE, Beginner

article.title: Need Guidance for System Design Prep (LLD) – 1 YOE, Beginner
article.content:
# Need Guidance for System Design Prep (LLD) – 1 YOE, Beginner

Hi community 👋

I'm currently preparing for **DSA interviews** and realized I should also start focusing on **System Design**, especially the **Low-Level Design (LLD)** rounds that are common in interviews nowadays.

## 🧑‍💻 About Me  
- I have **1 year of experience**  
- I have **no prior knowledge** of system design  
- I recently purchased **Shreyansh Jain's YouTube Membership** for system design  
- Still, I find **LLD a bit tricky and hard to grasp** 😓

## 🙏 What I Need Help With
I’d be really grateful if someone could help me with:
- A beginner-friendly **roadmap** to start learning LLD
- Good **resources** (free or paid)
- Tips to understand:
  - **OOP principles**
  - **Design Patterns**
  - How to break down and approach **LLD problems**
- How to **practice** and implement these concepts in real code

## 💡 My Goal
I want to prepare in the **easiest and most structured way possible**, without getting overwhelmed by too much content. I’m ready to stay consistent, but I just need proper **direction and guidance**.

Thanks in advance to everyone who helps! 🙌💙

post.content:
The course that you have purchased is more than enough and I get you because I am also a 2024 graduate and facing the same issue .... still I have managed to find some of the most frequent question 

Basic
______

Design a URL Shortener (e.g., Bit.ly)
Design a Rate Limiter
Design a Notification System
Design a File Upload Service (e.g., Google Drive)
Design a RESTful API for a Blog / Notes App
Design a Cache System

Advanced
__________

Design a Tiny Twitter / News Feed System
Design Pastebin
Design a Messaging / Chat System (e.g., WhatsApp)


[Free System Design Playlist](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLpxM6m39X_t-Rk9lZVVD4U6JycAAIIEDW&si=3-DJySZf2cFD01Jv)

Hope this helps !!
